creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
blackened is a neat alternative irc client.

How-To-Repeat: 
Port is located at:
        http://www.cana.net/~acme/ports/blackened.tar.gz

Due to the size of the PLIST file, I have decided that sending
a shar is not wise. Also, since this is my first port, would you (note:
committers) prefer that I upload files in .tar or .tar.gz? This port is a
little big, so I thought...
